metadata.title: Custom File Explorer sorting
metadata.description: Custom File Explorer sorting Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The status bar entry shows the label `Custom sort:ON` or `Custom sort:OFF`, representing the current state of the plugin.
ast.target: 状态栏条目显示标签 `Custom sort:ON` 或 `Custom sort:OFF`，表示插件当前状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin can show notifications about its state changes: e.g. when successfully parsed and applied the custom sorting specification, or, when the parsing failed. If the notifications are disabled, the only indicator of plugin state is the ribbon button icon. The developer console presents the parsing error messages regardless if the notifications are enabled or not.
ast.target: 插件可显示其状态变化的通知：例如成功解析并应用自定义排序规范时，或解析失败时。如果禁用通知，插件状态的唯一指示是功能区按钮图标。无论是否启用通知，开发者控制台都会显示解析错误信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: See above.
ast.target: 见上文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gives access to operations relevant for custom sorting, e.g. applying custom sorting.
ast.target: 提供与自定义排序相关的操作入口，例如应用自定义排序。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay for initial automatic application of custom ordering
ast.target: 初次自动应用自定义排序的延迟

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Path or name of additional note(s) containing sorting specification
ast.target: 包含排序规范的附加笔记的路径或名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Name of index note (Folder Notes support)
ast.target: 索引笔记名称（支持 Folder Notes）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable the status bar entry
ast.target: 启用状态栏条目

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable notifications of plugin state changes
ast.target: 启用插件状态变化通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable notifications of plugin state changes for mobile devices only
ast.target: 仅为移动设备启用插件状态变化通知

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable File Explorer context submenu`Custom sort:`
ast.target: 启用文件资源管理器右键子菜单`自定义排序:`

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic integration with core Bookmarks plugin (for indirect drag & drop ordering)
ast.target: 与核心书签插件自动集成（用于间接拖放排序）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Context menus for Bookmarks integration
ast.target: 书签集成的右键菜单

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g. sorting-configuration
ast.target: 例如 sorting-configuration

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g. _about_ or index
ast.target: 例如 _about_ 或 index

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g. Group for sorting
ast.target: 例如 用于排序的组

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Custom sort:
ast.target: 自定义排序：

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enable and apply the custom sorting, (re)parsing the sorting configuration first. Sort-on.
ast.target: 启用并应用自定义排序，先（重新）解析排序配置。Sort-on。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Suspend the custom sorting. Sort-off.
ast.target: 暂停自定义排序。Sort-off。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bookmarks integration
ast.target: 书签集成
